gist.headline: Visiona joins the garden
gist.blurb: The greenhouse is growing! Visiona just sprouted in our community apps garden, bringing intelligent, AI-powered web experiences to the ecosystem.
gist.summary: Added Visiona, a new AI-powered responsive web interface, to the community apps showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now explore Visiona in the community gallery to see a great example of real-time AI integration in web tools.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a gardener in the Greenhouse, watering a new 'Visiona' plant that has a glowing screen or eye, representing the new web interface app.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny gardener's apron, watering a glowing new code-plant in a lush digital greenhouse. The plant has a small retro monitor for a flower, displaying a bright eye. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny gardener's apron, watering a glowing new code-plant in a lush digital greenhouse. The plant has a small retro monitor for a flower, displaying a bright eye. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
